metadata.title: OpenHospi — Free Student Housing Platform for the Netherlands
metadata.description: OpenHospi is the free, open-source platform for student housing in the Netherlands. Verified via SURFconext — no middlemen, no fees.

footer.tagline: Free, open-source student housing for the Netherlands.

hero.title:
Hospiteren.
Free. Fair.
Students only.
hero.subtitle: OpenHospi is the free, open-source platform for student housing in the Netherlands. Verified via SURFconext — no middlemen, no fees.

free.title: Always free
free.description: No hidden fees, no premium plans. No one can pay to get ahead. Every student gets the same visibility — free, forever.

verified.title: Verified students
verified.description: Every user is verified through SURFconext — only real students.

encrypted.title: E2E encrypted chat
encrypted.description: Your conversations are end-to-end encrypted. We can't read them, nobody can.

fair.title: Fair and transparent
fair.description: Open source and community-driven. No company profiting from it — started by a student, for all students.

step1.title: Log in
step1.description: Sign in with your university account via SURFconext.

step2.title: Search
step2.description: Browse available rooms or list your house.

step3.title: Get chosen
step3.description: Houses invite candidates — the traditional Dutch hospiteren.

students.title: Only real students
students.description: On OpenHospi, your university or hogeschool verifies you through SURFconext. Your institution stands behind your profile — so everyone knows you're a real student. No fake profiles, no scams.

openSource.title: Open source
openSource.description: OpenHospi is fully open source. Anyone can inspect the code, contribute, or run their own instance. Transparency is not a feature — it's a principle.

cta.title: Ready to find your room?
cta.subtitle: Be among the first students on the fairest housing platform in the Netherlands — free, fair, and students only.

findRoom.title: Find a room
findRoom.subtitle: The easiest way to find your next student room — free, fair, and only for verified students.

items.description: Every user is a real student, verified by their university or hogeschool through SURFconext. No fake profiles.

items.title: Completely free
items.description: No hidden fees, no premium plans. No one can pay to get ahead. Every student gets the same visibility.

items.title: Fair for everyone
items.description: Open source and community-driven. No company profiting from it — started by a student, for all students.

items.description: Add your study, hobbies, and preferences so houses get to know you.

items.title: Get invited to hospiteren
items.description: If the house likes your profile, they'll invite you for a visit.

items.title: Move in!
items.description: After a successful hospiteren, you're in. Welcome home!

listRoom.title: List a room
listRoom.subtitle: The easiest way to find your next housemate.

items.title: Verified candidates
items.description: Every candidate is a real student, verified by their university or hogeschool through SURFconext.

items.title: Completely free
items.description: No listing fees, no premium placements. No one pays to appear first. Fair for everyone.

items.title: Manage responses
items.description: Review profiles, read messages, and invite candidates — all in one place.

items.title: Share your listing
items.description: Generate a unique link to share on social media or in group chats.

items.title: Log in with SURFconext
items.description: All members verify via their university account.

items.title: Create your house
items.description: Add your address, photos, room details, and house rules.

items.title: Publish your listing
items.description: Make your room visible to verified students across the Netherlands.

items.title: Review responses
items.description: Browse candidate profiles and read their personal messages.

items.title: Invite candidates
items.description: Select your favorites and invite them for hospiteren.

items.title: Choose your new housemate
items.description: After hospiteren, pick the person who fits best.

shareLink.title: Share your listing anywhere
shareLink.description: Every room gets a unique link you can share on Instagram, WhatsApp, or your house website.

cta.title: Ready to find your next housemate?

safety.title: Safety & Trust
safety.subtitle: Your safety is our top priority. Here's how we protect you.

features.title: SURFconext verification
features.description: Every user is verified by their own university or hogeschool through SURFconext. Your institution stands behind your profile. No fake profiles.

features.title: End-to-end encrypted chat
features.description: Messages are encrypted between sender and receiver. We cannot read your conversations.

features.title: No trackers
features.description: We don't use third-party trackers, analytics cookies, or sell your data.

features.title: GDPR compliant
features.description: We follow EU data protection regulations. You can export or delete your data anytime.

features.title: Open source
features.description: Our entire codebase is public. Anyone can audit how we handle your data.

features.title: Report & block
features.description: Report inappropriate behavior or block users with one click. We act on reports quickly.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: OpenHospi exists to make student housing in the Netherlands fair, free, and accessible. We believe finding a room shouldn't cost money, and the process should be transparent. OpenHospi will never be freemium or pay-to-win: no one can pay to get more visibility. Every student gets the same chances.

crisis.title: The problem
crisis.description: Students search for rooms through Facebook groups, Instagram, and paid platforms. On commercial sites, you pay to see listings or get priority. That's unfair — the system works for platforms, not for students.

builtBy.title: How it started
builtBy.description: Ruben zag medestudenten worstelen met Facebook-groepen, Instagram en betaalde platforms. Hij ervoer het niet zelf, maar zag om zich heen hoe moeilijk het was. Zo is OpenHospi ontstaan.

openSource.title: Open source & community
openSource.description: OpenHospi is a community project. Anyone can contribute code, translations, or ideas. We're transparent about everything we do.

sections.title: What data we collect
sections.content: We collect data you provide when creating your account (via SURFconext), your profile information, room listings, and messages you send through the platform.

sections.title: SURFconext data
sections.content: When you log in via SURFconext, we receive your name, email address, institution, and affiliation (student/employee). We use this to verify your identity and create your account.

sections.title: How we use your data
sections.content: We use your data solely to provide the OpenHospi platform. We do not sell your data, use it for advertising, or share it with third parties except as required by law.

sections.title: Data processor
sections.content: Our database is hosted on Supabase (EU region). Supabase acts as our data processor under a Data Processing Agreement.

sections.title: Data retention
sections.content: Your data is retained as long as your account is active. You can delete your account at any time, which will permanently remove all your data.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.content: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, export, and delete your personal data. Contact us at privacy@openhospi.nl to exercise these rights.

sections.title: Eligibility
sections.content: OpenHospi is available to students and staff of Dutch educational institutions that are connected to SURFconext.

sections.title: Account responsibilities
sections.content: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account. Do not share your login credentials or attempt to impersonate others.

sections.title: Acceptable use
sections.content: You agree to use OpenHospi only for finding or offering student housing. Harassment, discrimination, fraud, and spam are prohibited.

sections.title: Content ownership
sections.content: You retain ownership of content you post (profile text, photos, messages). By posting, you grant OpenHospi a license to display this content on the platform.

sections.title: Liability
sections.content: OpenHospi is provided as-is. We are not responsible for the accuracy of listings, the behavior of other users, or any transactions made outside the platform.

sections.title: Governing law
sections.content: These terms are governed by Dutch law. Any disputes will be resolved in the courts of the Netherlands.

costs.title: Costs & Transparency
costs.subtitle: OpenHospi is free for all users. Here's what it costs us to run.

intro.title: What does OpenHospi cost?
intro.description: OpenHospi is and will always be free for students. No hidden fees, no premium plans, no ads. Here's a transparent overview of our running costs — all prices include 21% VAT.

items.name: Vercel
items.description: Website hosting, CDN en bestandsopslag

items.name: Neon
items.description: Serverless PostgreSQL database

items.name: SURFconext
items.description: Student verification

items.name: openhospi.nl
items.description: .nl domain

items.name: openhospi.com
items.description: .com domain

items.name: openhospi.eu
items.description: .eu domain

groups.name: App Stores
groups.description: Publishing to iOS and Android app stores

items.name: Apple Developer Program
items.description: Required for iOS App Store

items.name: Google Play Developer
items.description: Required for Play Store

keepFree.title: How do we keep it free?

pillars.title: Donations
pillars.description: Individual contributions from users who want to support the platform.

pillars.title: Sponsorships
pillars.description: Universities and student organizations can sponsor OpenHospi.

pillars.title: Open source
pillars.description: Volunteer developers contribute code, reducing development costs.

tiers.name: Backer
tiers.description: Your name on our sponsors page.

tiers.name: Sponsor
tiers.description: Your logo on our website and README.

tiers.name: Donation
tiers.description: Support with any amount you choose.

transparency.title: Where does the money go?
transparency.description: 100% of donations go to infrastructure costs. Via Open Collective every transaction is published publicly. No salaries, no profit — just keeping the platform running for students.

missingAssociation.title: Staat jouw vereniging er niet bij?
missingAssociation.description: Onze lijst is gebaseerd op Wikipedia en kan onvolledig zijn. Laat het ons weten en we voegen jouw vereniging toe!
missingAssociation.emailBody:
Hallo OpenHospi,

Ik wil graag de volgende vereniging laten toevoegen:

Naam: [naam van de vereniging]
Stad: [stad]
Website: [url]

Bedankt!
